mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, job_code, job_name, job_type, biz_type, schedule_type, schedule_expr, timezone, worker_group, queue_code, calendar_code, window_code, trigger_mode, dag_enabled, shard_strategy, retry_policy, retry_max_count, timeout_seconds, execution_handler, param_schema::text AS param_schema_text, priority, default_params::text AS default_params_text, version, enabled, description, execution_mode, watermark_field, previous_day_dependency_scope, job_group_code
mapper.insert:
insert into batch.job_definition ( tenant_id, job_code, job_name, job_type, biz_type, schedule_type, schedule_expr, timezone, worker_group, queue_code, calendar_code, window_code, trigger_mode, dag_enabled, shard_strategy, retry_policy, retry_max_count, timeout_seconds, execution_handler, param_schema, priority, default_params, version, enabled, description, execution_mode, watermark_field, previous_day_dependency_scope, job_group_code ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{jobCode}, #{jobName}, #{jobType}, #{bizType}, #{scheduleType}, #{scheduleExpr}, #{timezone}, #{workerGroup}, #{queueCode}, #{calendarCode}, #{windowCode}, #{triggerMode},
#{dagEnabled} false , #{shardStrategy}, #{retryPolicy}, #{retryMaxCount}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{executionHandler},
cast(#{paramSchema,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.example.batch.orchestrator.infrastructure.mybatis.MapJsonbTypeHandler} as jsonb)
null ,
#{priority} 5 ,
cast(#{defaultParams,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.example.batch.orchestrator.infrastructure.mybatis.MapJsonbTypeHandler} as jsonb)
null ,
#{version} 1 ,
#{enabled} true , #{description}, #{executionMode}, #{watermarkField},
#{previousDayDependencyScope} 'INHERIT' , #{jobGroupCode} )
mapper.update:
update batch.job_definition set job_name = #{jobName}, job_type = #{jobType}, biz_type = #{bizType}, schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, schedule_expr = #{scheduleExpr}, timezone = #{timezone}, worker_group = #{workerGroup}, queue_code = #{queueCode}, calendar_code = #{calendarCode}, window_code = #{windowCode}, trigger_mode = #{triggerMode}, dag_enabled = #{dagEnabled}, shard_strategy = #{shardStrategy}, retry_policy = #{retryPolicy}, retry_max_count = #{retryMaxCount}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, execution_handler = #{executionHandler}, param_schema =
cast(#{paramSchema,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.example.batch.orchestrator.infrastructure.mybatis.MapJsonbTypeHandler} as jsonb)
null , priority = #{priority}, default_params =
cast(#{defaultParams,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.example.batch.orchestrator.infrastructure.mybatis.MapJsonbTypeHandler} as jsonb)
null , version = #{version}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, execution_mode = #{executionMode}, watermark_field = #{watermarkField}, previous_day_dependency_scope = #{previousDayDependencyScope}, job_group_code = #{jobGroupCode}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
